stat.title: Rally Killers
stat.subtitle: GIDPs with a runner on second (or worse).

notableEvents.label: Anthony Seigler rally-killer GIDP · Bot 6
notableEvents.detail: Anthony Seigler grounds into a double play, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Carlos Narváez to 3rd. Tsung-Che Cheng out at 2nd. Anthony Seigler out at 1st.
